name: Zeus — Apple-native Search & Connections
description: Multi-modal Apple ecosystem-native search & connections. v1.3 adiciona afm-refine (Writing Tools nativo via FoundationModels), asp-transcribe/asp-vad (SpeechAnalyzer + SpeechTranscriber macOS 26+) para indexar voice memos do vault, e python-worker-layer (apple-fm-sdk Python via child_process.spawn) para batch jobs offline. v1.4 traz paridade Mac↔iOS via endpoints /v1/refine (Writing Tools livre), /v1/hyde (Hypothetical Document Embeddings), /v1/graph/extract (extração de triplas) e /v1/agent com context RAG-style. Mantém Passport Index Architecture v1.2 token-efficient, Apple Cloud Private (PCC) opt-in end-to-end, camadas afm (Foundation Models), av (Vision: classify+OCR+landmarks+EXIF), anl (NLContextualEmbedding 512-dim), aia (Intelligence: enrich+agent+graph com chunking hierárquico NexusSum) e HyDE query expansion. Indexação no Mac via daemon SwiftNIO, leitura cross-device via iCloud + Tailscale.
author: Roger Maiocchi
